description: Rust app to automate the installation and update of Linux Gaming Compatibility tools, like ProtonGE, Luxtorpeda, Boxtron and others
builtUsing: rust-hyper-rustls (= 0.27.9+ds-1), rust-inquire (= 0.9.4+ds-1), rust-libprotonup (= 0.14.0-1), rust-option-ext (= 0.2.0-1), rust-rustls (= 0.23.41+ds-1), rust-rustls-native-certs (= 0.8.4+ds-1), rust-rustls-pki-types (= 1.14.1+ds-1), rust-rustls-platform-verifier (= 0.6.2-1), rust-rustls-webpki (= 0.103.13+ds-1), rustc (= 1.95.0+dfsg1-2)
